'''ât-z-y-n''' ('''katazyenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:machine|machine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-z-y-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:machine|machine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-z-y-n
|-
! Lemma
| katazyenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitazyenoko|thitazyenoko]] || [[word:jitazyenoko|jitazyenoko]] || [[word:shitazyenoko|shitazyenoko]] || [[word:kitazyenoko|kitazyenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutazyenoko|thuthutazyenoko]] || [[word:jujutazyenoko|jujutazyenoko]] || [[word:shushutazyenoko|shushutazyenoko]] || [[word:kukutazyenoko|kukutazyenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotazyenoko|thotazyenoko]] || [[word:jotazyenoko|jotazyenoko]] || [[word:shotazyenoko|shotazyenoko]] || [[word:kotazyenoko|kotazyenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtazyenoko|thĂŠtazyenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtazyenoko|jĂŠtazyenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtazyenoko|shĂŠtazyenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtazyenoko|kĂŠtazyenoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatazyenoko|thatazyenoko]] || [[word:jatazyenoko|jatazyenoko]] || [[word:shatazyenoko|shatazyenoko]] || [[word:katazyenoko|katazyenoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
